message:
Add rich diff rendering in tool messages and capability prompt test suite

Tool output diff rendering (src/interactive.rs):
- New render_diff_lines() function producing syntax-highlighted diff output
  with truncation for large diffs (DIFF_TRUNCATE_THRESHOLD = 50 lines,
  showing head 20 + tail 10 with omission count)
- render_word_diff_pair() for inline word-level change highlighting within
  modified lines
- split_diff_prefix() extracts +/- prefix from diff lines for styling
- Refactored render_tool_message() to two-pass: extract pre-diff text
  and diff block, render file path as @@ header, apply truncation
- Extract file path from "Successfully replaced text in {path}." pattern

Provider test cleanup:
- cohere.rs, openai_responses.rs: Replace vec![] with array literal []
  for test event data (clippy lint)

Capability prompt test suite (tests/capability_prompt.rs — 1102 lines):
- PermissionStore tests: persistence, corrupt file recovery
- TUI modal overlay tests: keyboard navigation, confirm, escape, auto-deny
- RPC event serialization tests
- Extension manager UI channel lifecycle: request/respond roundtrip
- Policy evaluation tests: strict/prompt/permissive mode enforcement
- Prompt caching tests: ask-once semantics for repeated capability checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
